title: Brevo vs Drip (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Brevo and Drip email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which platform suits your business best.
intro: Brevo and Drip are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Brevo offers a freemium all-in-one CRM suite with multi-channel capabilities, while Drip specializes in e-commerce automation with deep store integrations. Choosing between them depends on your budget, business type, and feature requirements.

comparison_table.tool_b: E-commerce businesses with deep store integration needs

comparison_table.tool_a: SMS, WhatsApp, live chat, CRM, transactional API, large free tier
comparison_table.tool_b: E-commerce tracking, revenue attribution, visual automation, onsite campaigns

choose_a_if: You want a free tier that supports up to 100,000 contacts without payment
You need multi-channel marketing (SMS, WhatsApp, live chat) beyond just email
You're a small business or startup with limited budget and need CRM functionality
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce store and need deep platform integrations for revenue tracking
You want specialized e-commerce features like product recommendations and cart abandonment
You prioritize advanced automation and segmentation tools built specifically for online sellers

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Brevo excels for businesses needing a free tier and multi-channel marketing, while Drip is superior for e-commerce-specific automation and revenue attribution. Brevo has higher overall ratings on G2 and Trustpilot, but Drip's features are more specialized for online stores.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or Drip?
faq.a: Brevo is significantly cheaper, offering a robust free tier supporting 100,000 contacts with no payment required. Drip has no free tier and starts at $39/month. If you need paid features, Brevo's paid plans begin at $25/month compared to Drip's $39/month minimum.

faq.q: Can I switch from Drip to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms typically support contact list exports and integrations with third-party migration tools. However, Drip's e-commerce-specific automation workflows may not have direct equivalents in Brevo, so you may need to reconfigure some automations. It's recommended to plan your migration carefully to avoid losing campaign data.
